title: Finishing a Game
creator: Derek Yu
description: Practical advice on choosing an idea, planning, protecting the core experience, handling unfinished work, testing, and releasing.
useful: A grounded checklist for developers who repeatedly begin projects but struggle to complete them.
audience: Solo and small-team developers who start projects more easily than they finish them.
learning: Choose a project small enough to complete
Protect the core while cutting secondary work
Move through testing, polish, and release
